title: leontodon × sooi
intro: Leontodon × sooi is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross-breeding of the Leontodon helveticus and Leontodon hispidus plants, belonging to the dandelion family. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Leontodon × sooi include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be consumed fresh or dried for its medicinal benefits.
